response.step_by_step_log: Detected 'Otonoke' (オトノケ) in top-left corner at start. Performed search 'Otonoke Creepy Nuts Japanese and English lyrics'. Detected 'Fortune Spinner' at 02:45 with credits. Performed search 'Fortune Spinner Hololive English lyrics'. Lyrics were found for both songs.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring Hololive Myth members Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, and Ninomae Ina'nis. The video consists of two main songs: 'Otonoke' by Creepy Nuts and their own original song, 'Fortune Spinner'.

scenes.description: Hololive Myth members perform 'Otonoke' by Creepy Nuts. Song title appears in the top-left corner at 00:00.
scenes.performer_in_video: Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
祓いたいのなら末代までの札束 (okay?)
誰かが開けたパンドラの箱
その先はどうなっても知らねえ (no way!)
何百年待ったかな
現世に舞い戻ってからもう久しいな
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If you want to purify, bring a stack of bills for generations (okay?)
Someone opened the Pandora's box
I don't care what happens next (no way!)
How many hundreds of years have I waited?
It's been a long time since I've been in the real world

scenes.description: The performance transitions to 'Fortune Spinner' by Hololive English -Myth-, with on-screen credit text.
scenes.performer_in_video: Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
There's an answer out there somewhere
When the Muses whisper "truth or dare?"
The hands of fate play tug-of-war
But no one's keeping score
Stay the course and be tenacious
'Cause the future is a game of chance.
The chips are down, but I'm all in
I play until I win!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
There's an answer out there somewhere
When the Muses whisper "truth or dare?"
The hands of fate play tug-of-war
But no one's keeping score
Stay the course and be tenacious
'Cause the future is a game of chance.
The chips are down, but I'm all in
I play until I win!
